message:
fix: wrap DOLT_PULL in explicit transaction for autocommit compat (GH#2501)

DOLT_PULL fails with "merge conflict detected, @autocommit transaction
rolled back" when the remote has diverged, even for clean merges. Wrap
the query in BEGIN/COMMIT so Dolt can handle merge operations.

Co-Authored-By: jaronjaron <noreply@github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
